specific_human_review_focus: Check the exact Finnish wording for fabricated/non-existent case references, distorted legal support, the institutional roles of Internal Finland Police and the Eastern Finland Administrative Court, and whether the article frames the burden as official labor cost rather than broader systemic failure.
paper_thesis_delta_if_review_completes: Would harden Table 1D appendix prose, methods/results wording, reviewer-response language, and thesis claim-support notes around public-institution encounter plus workload effect without widening the authority class.
what_review_will_not_change: It would not make the row official, prove prevalence, establish adjudicated wrongdoing, remove translation metadata, or justify stronger system-wide legal/procedural contamination claims.
current_claim_ceiling: Direct Yle article text supports a narrow claim that Internal Finland Police and the Eastern Finland Administrative Court have noticed AI-assisted administrative appeals, that police lawyer Mikko Porvali says some filings contain fabricated case references or distorted legal support, and that responding still consumes official labor; stronger claims about prevalence, abuse intent, or broader legal-system contamination remain bounded because the row currently relies on one journalistic source and machine-assisted reading.

observatory_hook: Procedural-contamination timeline; jurisdiction/language coverage matrix; public-sector workload-cost panel; authority-weighted lead-to-direct-source upgrade funnel.

why_review_now: Human review is valuable here because the local-news row contains the sharpest overread risk in the package: English glosses can easily slide from announced AI-assisted call routing into stronger labor-replacement or municipal-deployment claims.
specific_human_review_focus: Check the exact Slovenian wording around 'namesto tajnice', natural answering, recognizing call content, routing to the competent office, and the municipality's self-description as among the first in Slovenia so the row stays descriptive rather than theatrical or overstated.

what_review_will_not_change: It would not create official corroboration, confirm vendor/technical stack, show procurement regularity, prove effectiveness, or establish that humans are absent from the service channel.
current_claim_ceiling: Direct Radio Ptuj article text supports a narrow claim that the mayor of the Municipality of Sveta Trojica publicly announced an AI-assisted municipal-secretariat phone agent named Klara that answers calls naturally, recognizes the content of a call, and routes callers to the competent office; the article also says the municipality describes itself as among the first in Slovenia to introduce such a solution in everyday municipal-administration work. Stronger claims about full human replacement, the exact vendor/technical stack, legality, effectiveness, procurement process, or whether any human fallback remains behind the phone channel still require direct municipal documentation and human review.
observatory_hook: Institutional absurdity queue; municipal service-channel map; authority-weighted lead-to-direct-source upgrade funnel; public-administration phone-routing comparison.
